description_long: This is a large, rectangular chest-style refrigerator with a flat, hinged lid and a minimalist design. The exterior is smooth and predominantly white, with a single, centered handle on the front for opening the lid. On the lower right of the front face, there is a small control panel with indicator lights and a button, suggesting temperature control or power status. The sides and back are plain, with no visible vents, grilles, or additional features. The overall construction appears robust, likely made from metal with an insulated core, and the top surface is flat and broad. This type of refrigerator is commonly used in garages, utility rooms, or commercial settings for bulk storage of perishable goods.
description: A large, white chest-style refrigerator with a flat lid, front handle, and a small control panel on the front. Its design is simple and robust, suitable for utility or commercial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat lid, centered handle, and a small control panel with indicator lights on the lower right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, featureless surface with the handle just visible at the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely plain, flat surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with the handle slightly visible at the top edge.
attribute_door_handle_style: Rectangular, centered, protruding handle integrated into the front edge of the lid.
